extortion.description: Craig & Associates, LLC was incorporated August 1, 1980.  We have been serving individuals and businesses for over 40 years and offer a variety of services: income tax preparation, strategic tax planning, financial planning, estate planning, retirement planning, insurance planning, investment review, auditing & accounting services, recordkeeping & reports, payroll & sales tax services, pension & profit sharing plan services and incorporations & partnerships. We work with several types of businesses including Corporations, S-Corporations, Partnerships, Condominium Associations, Municipalities and Not-for-Profit Organizations.
